title: Database Meltdown 🔥
description: The servers are crashing! Use Transactions to restore the schema before we go offline.
story: Alarms are blaring. Red lights are flashing. A junior developer just ran an UPDATE without a WHERE clause, wiping out all the account balances! Thankfully, he wrapped his script in a transaction block, but he hasn't committed it yet. You have exactly 10 seconds to stop this catastrophe.

tasks.title: Hit the Emergency Undo
tasks.description: A destructive transaction is currently open. What is the single SQL command you must execute to immediately abort the transaction and revert all changes to safety?
tasks.instruction: Write the exact single-word SQL command used to undo an uncommitted transaction.
